Subject: Issue while taking the test
Response: If none of the submissions across any challenges are working on the HackerRank website, try the following steps: 1) Close the challenge window and reopen it using the same challenge link [#1]. 2) Open the challenge in another supported browser, such as the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, or Edge, for full compatibility [#1]. 3) Ensure your internet connection is stable [#1]. If you are still facing issues, contact HackerRank support at help@hackerrank.com or support@hackerrank.com [#1][#3].

Issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
Subject: Subscription pause
Response:
Hi, 

To pause your subscription, follow these steps: 
1) Access Subscription Settings by clicking on the profile icon and selecting Settings, then navigate to the Billing section under Subscription [#1]. 
2) Initiate the pause by clicking the Cancel Plan button and selecting the desired pause duration, which can be between 1 and 12 months [#1]. 
3) Confirm the pause by clicking Confirm Pause, and a confirmation message will appear with the pause duration and automatic resume date [#1]. 
Note that to use the Pause Subscription feature, you must have an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago and have a monthly subscription for an eligible plan [#2].

Issue: Claude has stopped working completely, all requests are failing
Subject: Claude not responding
Response:
Hi, 

If Claude has stopped working completely and all requests are failing, it could be due to various reasons such as API connection errors, usage limits, or capacity constraints [#1][#2][#3][#4]. Check if there are any firewall rules or network restrictions blocking the connection to the Claude API endpoint, and ensure you're not using a VPN when running the request [#1]. Also, verify if you've reached your usage limits, as this can prevent you from using Claude until the next billing period or until your limits are adjusted [#2][#3]. Additionally, capacity issues can occur when Claude's infrastructure experiences high demand system-wide, resulting in temporary constraints [#4]. Try again later or consider upgrading your Claude plan, and if the problem persists, contact the Support team for further assistance [#3].

Issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
Subject: Certificate name update
Response:
Hi, 

You can update the name on your certificate only once per account [#1]. To update the name on your certificate: 1) Open your certificate page. 2) In the **Full Name** field, enter the name you want to display. 3) Click **Regenerate Certificate**. 4) In the confirmation dialog, click **Update Name** [#1].

Issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
Subject: Website Data crawl
Response: To stop Claude from crawling your website, you can modify the robots.txt file by adding the following lines: User-agent: ClaudeBot, Disallow: / [#1][#2]. This will block the ClaudeBot from crawling your entire website. You can also use the Crawl-delay extension to limit crawling activity, for example: User-agent: ClaudeBot, Crawl-delay: 1 [#1].

Issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
Subject: Personal Data Use
Response:
Hi, 

If you are allowing Claude to use your data to improve the models through the Development Partner Program, your data will be stored securely for up to two years, and data used for model training will not be associated with other customer information [#2]. However, if you are using Claude for Excel, PowerPoint, or Word, inputs and outputs are automatically deleted on the backend within 30 days of receipt or generation, except in cases outlined in the data retention policy [#3][#4][#5]. 

Hope this helps.

Issue: I am facing multiple issues in my project. all requests to claude with aws bedrock is failing
Subject: Issues in Project
Response:
Hi, 

If all requests to Claude with AWS Bedrock are failing, it may indicate an issue on your end, potentially related to your firewall, network, or VPN [#1]. Try checking if there are any firewall rules or network restrictions blocking the connection to the Claude API endpoint, and configure your settings to allow the connection [#1]. Additionally, ensure you're not using a VPN when running the request [#1]. 

If you're encountering a 403 error or "model not available" message, confirm that your account has access to the model Claude Code is requesting, and that the specific Claude model is enabled in your region or project on Bedrock or Vertex [#2]. 

For Bedrock-specific issues, confirm that `aws sts get-caller-identity` works and `AWS_REGION` is set to a region where your model is enabled [#3]. 

You can access Claude Code via Bedrock without exposing a secret key/access key by following the setup guides for Bedrock, which show how to enable this using `aws configure` or Bedrock API keys [#4]. 

For deployment and pricing information on Claude in Amazon Bedrock or GCP Vertex, you can find more information through the provided links, including contacting AWS directly for pricing and commitment requirements [#5].

Issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
Subject: Employee leaving the company
Response: To remove an employee from your HackerRank hiring account, you can revoke their test access by following these steps: 1) Log in to your HackerRank for Work account, 2) Go to the Tests tab, 3) Open the test from which you want to revoke access, 4) Click Share, 5) Locate the user, 6) Select the role drop-down next to their name, 7) Select Remove User, and 8) Confirm in the confirmation dialog box [#2]. Alternatively, if the employee was part of a team, you can delete the team after removing all users, but this requires Company Admin or Team Admin access [#3]. For bulk deletion of candidate data, you need to raise a request to support@hackerrank.com [#4].

Issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
Subject: Claude for students
Response: To set up a Claude LTI key for your students, you need to follow these steps: create a Claude LTI developer key in Canvas by navigating to Admin -> Developer Keys and following the prompts [#2], then install the Claude LTI as an app in Canvas by going to Admin -> Settings -> Apps and selecting the Configuration Type as "By Client ID" [#3], and finally turn on the Claude LTI integration in Claude for Education organization settings by signing in as an administrator and navigating to Organization settings > Connectors and enabling the Canvas integration [#4].

Issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
Subject: Visa card minimum spend
Response:
Hi, 

In the US Virgin Islands, a merchant may require a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for credit card transactions, as per Visa's rules [#1]. This exception applies in the USA and US territories, including the US Virgin Islands, but only for credit cards, not debit cards [#1]. If you have concerns about a merchant requiring a minimum transaction amount for a Visa debit card or exceeding the US$10 limit for a credit card, you should notify your Visa card issuer [#1].
